title: Product Positioning & Messaging Strategy
shortDescription: Build a strategic positioning framework with competitive framing, differentiation axes, and value narrative.

inputs.label: Product Description
inputs.example: Project management and issue tracking tool built for software teams that prioritize speed and quality

inputs.label: Target Customer
inputs.example: Engineering teams at fast-moving startups and scale-ups (Series A to C)

inputs.label: Unique Strengths
inputs.example: Best-in-class UI speed, opinionated workflows, keyboard-first design, developer-loved brand

inputs.label: Positioning Goal
inputs.example: Own the 'fast and focused' category for engineering project management, differentiate from Jira's complexity
